4. Test RAG: python3 -c "import asyncio; from app.openai_client import make_openai_client; from app.rag.chain import rag_answer; asyncio.run(rag_answer('best action anime 2023', make_openai_client()))"
5. Day 3: implement LangGraph agent in backend/app/agent/

rag_pipeline_notes.auto_filter: extract_filters() parses year/genre/format/score from natural language

known_gotchas: ShopAIKey requires User-Agent header (Cloudflare WAF blocks plain requests)
ShopAIKey may return 522 Cloudflare timeout — retry after a few minutes
AsyncOpenAI client: all methods are coroutines, must be awaited
extract_filters uses response_format=json_object — not supported by all OpenAI-compatible providers; falls back gracefully on error
